title: Live, Love and Learn
writer: Charles Brackett, Cyril Hume, Richard Maibaum
actors: Robert Montgomery, Rosalind Russell, Robert Benchley
plot: Bob is a struggling artist who paints for his own amusement. Julie is a rich society girl. When they meet, it is cute and they are soon married. Living in a small apartment with the constant company of close friend Oscar, they are...
